data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances account security through additional verification steps during login.
data.technical_spec: Combines password with a temporary, time-based code.

data.title: Advanced Encryption Standards
data.description: Uses strong encryption techniques to secure data in transit.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 bit encryption for data and TLS for network security.

data.title: Abuse Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors and detects potentially harmful behaviors or spam activities.
data.technical_spec: Advanced machine learning and pattern recognition algorithms.

data.title: Vulnerability Management Program
data.description: Regularly scans and patches vulnerabilities to protect against exploits.
data.technical_spec: Automated tools and manual code reviews for vulnerability assessment.

data.title: Secure Backup and Data Recovery
data.description: Ensures user data can be recovered in the case of a cyber disaster.
data.technical_spec: Encrypted backups stored in secure data centers.
